summary: Implemented admitted PLAN-20260705-0001 as read-only L0 candidate diagnostics. Added ai_lab/documentation/l0_candidate_diagnostics.py, scripts/diagnose_l0_candidates.py, and tests/test_l0_candidate_diagnostics.py. The diagnostic reports valid L0 summary records as candidate sources with selection_effect none, optional context_match markers, and non-fatal dropped records. It does not change provider prompts, context selection, or latest-context behavior. Focused L0 diagnostic tests passed with 6 tests, self-model tests passed with 26 tests, and the full suite passed with 301 tests before commit.
